hero.subtitle: The trusted partner for food service professionals across the Middle East. From bespoke AutoCAD design to premium international supply and expert installation.

1.title: Italian Excellence, Local Expertise
1.desc: Direct partnerships with Italy's most prestigious manufacturers, paired with deep regional knowledge of Syrian and Middle Eastern food service operations.

2.title: Single-Source Accountability
2.desc: From design to commissioning, one trusted team owns the project. No finger-pointing between vendors — just clear accountability and seamless delivery.

3.title: Three Decades of Heritage
3.desc: Backed by Syrian House Group's 30+ years pioneering food service excellence across Africa and the Middle East. Our track record speaks for itself.

4.title: AutoCAD Precision Design
4.desc: Every project starts with engineered drawings — no guesswork. Our in-house CAD studio optimizes every centimeter for workflow, hygiene, and performance.

5.title: Long-Term Partnership
5.desc: We don't disappear after delivery. Spare parts, scheduled maintenance, staff training, and 24/7 support keep your operation running flawlessly for years.

why.intro: Five reasons leading hotels, restaurants, and patisseries across Syria and the Middle East trust us with the heart of their business.

syria.intro: From the heart of the world's oldest continuously inhabited capital, we serve the entire Syrian Republic. Damascus is more than our address — it is our heritage and our promise. We believe in Syria's hospitality renaissance, and we equip the kitchens powering it.

coverage.title: Nationwide Coverage
coverage.desc: Delivery, installation, and after-sales support across all 14 Syrian governorates.

heritage.label: Heritage
heritage.title: 8,000 Years of Hospitality
heritage.desc: Damascus has welcomed travelers and traders since the dawn of civilization. We carry that legacy forward in every modern kitchen we deliver.

about.p1: Santech Trading Co. was established in 2017 as the Syrian arm of the Syrian House Group, bringing decades of food service expertise from Sudan — where SHG has been a market leader since 1991 serving pastry shops, restaurants, and gelato studios across Africa.
about.p2: Based in Damascus, our mission is to be the trusted partner for every food service professional in Syria and the wider Middle East. We bring only premium, internationally certified equipment — paired with end-to-end consultancy, AutoCAD kitchen design, installation, and training. From a boutique patisserie to a five-star hotel catering kitchen, we deliver world-class solutions at every scale.

callout.title: Professional AutoCAD Kitchen Design
callout.text: Our in-house design team uses professional AutoCAD systems to prepare precise kitchen layouts tailored to every client's requirements — from spatial planning to equipment positioning and workflow optimization. Every detail matters when designing the heart of a food operation.

1.title: Consultancy & Planning
1.desc: Expert guidance from concept to completion. We analyze your space, workflow, budget, and operational needs to design the optimal food service solution.

2.title: AutoCAD Kitchen Design
2.desc: Professional computerized kitchen layouts drawn to precise specifications. Every dimension, equipment placement, and flow pattern is optimized before procurement begins.

3.title: Equipment Supply
3.desc: Direct access to 18+ premium international brands — Electrolux, Carpigiani, LaCimbali, UNOX, and more. We source only certified, industry-grade equipment.

4.title: Installation & Commissioning
4.desc: Full professional installation by trained technicians. Every machine is commissioned, tested, and calibrated to manufacturer specifications before handover.

5.title: Training & Certification
5.desc: Hands-on operational training for your team in partnership with our international suppliers. Your staff learns directly from the experts who built the equipment.

6.title: After-Sales Support
6.desc: Long-term partnership beyond the sale. Maintenance programs, spare parts availability, and technical support to keep your kitchen at peak performance.

services.intro: From the first consultation sketch to long-term support, Santech delivers a complete ecosystem of professional services — so you never have to manage multiple vendors.

partners.intro: We are the authorized distributor for 18+ premium international equipment manufacturers — each selected for their uncompromising quality, innovation, and service standards.

cta.text: Not sure which brand fits your needs?

contact.intro: Whether you're opening a new restaurant, expanding your hotel catering, or upgrading your pastry studio — our team is ready to consult, design, and supply.

message.ph: Tell us about your project — type of establishment, scale, specific equipment needs, timeline...

form.disclaimer: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

success.title: Message Received
success.text: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will respond within one business day.

footer.tagline: Premium HoReCa professional equipment distributor across the Middle East. Excellence in design, supply, and support.
footer.copyright: © {year} Santech Trading Co. (STC). All rights reserved.

1.title: Hotels & Resorts
1.desc: Full kitchen brigades, banquet halls, room service operations, and all-day dining venues for 3 to 5-star properties.

2.title: Restaurants
2.desc: Fine dining, casual concepts, fast-casual chains, and ghost kitchens — engineered for speed, consistency, and chef performance.

3.title: Cafés & Coffee Shops
3.desc: Specialty espresso bars, third-wave roasters, and café concepts equipped with world-class brewing systems.

4.title: Cloud Kitchens
4.desc: High-output delivery-only operations with optimized workflows for multi-brand, high-velocity production.

5.title: Catering Companies
5.desc: Central production kitchens, banquet equipment, and mobile catering setups for events of any scale.

6.title: Bakeries & Patisseries
6.desc: Artisan bakeries, pastry studios, gelato labs, and chocolate workshops with precision Italian equipment.

7.title: Hospitals & Healthcare
7.desc: High-volume institutional kitchens meeting strict hygiene, dietary, and food safety standards.

8.title: Schools & Universities
8.desc: Cafeterias, dormitory dining, and educational catering operations designed for high-throughput service.

industries.intro: Whatever your operation, we have equipped one like it. From boutique cafés to industrial central kitchens, our solutions scale to your ambition.

1.title: Consultation
1.desc: We listen. We assess your concept, menu, volume, space, and budget — then identify the path that maximizes your return.

2.title: AutoCAD Design
2.desc: Our engineers produce precision drawings — equipment placement, utility lines, ventilation, and workflow optimized to the centimeter.

3.title: Procurement
3.desc: We source directly from 18+ certified manufacturers in Europe and beyond. Logistics, customs, and delivery handled end-to-end.

4.title: Installation
4.desc: Our trained technicians install, connect, and integrate every piece — coordinating with contractors, plumbers, and electricians.

5.title: Training
5.desc: We don't leave until your team is confident. Operational training, manufacturer certifications, and ongoing knowledge transfer.

6.title: Service & Support
6.desc: Genuine spare parts in stock, scheduled maintenance, 24/7 emergency response — your kitchen runs flawlessly for years.

process.intro: A proven six-step methodology that turns your vision into a fully operational, professional kitchen — on time, on budget, on standard.

1.title: Banquet & Main Production Kitchen
1.scope: Full design, supply & installation — 80+ pieces of professional equipment serving 3 outlets and a 600-guest banquet hall.

2.title: Multi-Brand Production Hub
2.scope: High-velocity production line for 6 delivery brands, optimized for 800+ orders per day with zero cross-contamination.

3.title: Premium Pastry & Gelato Studio
3.scope: Carpigiani gelato production line, full pastry lab, and retail display — boutique concept built around Italian craftsmanship.

4.title: Central Production Kitchen
4.scope: Centralized prep facility serving 12 outlets — from butchery and cold prep to high-volume cooking and packaging.

projects.intro: A glimpse into the variety of food service operations we have designed, supplied, and commissioned across Syria and the region.

1.quote: Santech delivered a turnkey kitchen that exceeded our expectations. From the AutoCAD drawings to the final commissioning, every detail was handled with European-level professionalism.
1.name: Hotel General Manager

2.quote: We compared four suppliers. Santech was the only one who actually visited our space, understood our menu, and proposed a layout that improved our throughput by 35%. They earned our business.
2.name: Operations Director

3.quote: Their after-sales service is what keeps us coming back. Spare parts arrive fast, technicians know the equipment inside out, and downtime is virtually zero. A true long-term partner.
3.name: Executive Chef

testimonials.intro: Don't take our word for it. Hear from the chefs, owners, and operators who trust Santech with the heart of their business.

1.name: Dr. Ahmed Wasil Mongid
1.bio: Leading Santech's vision in Syria with three decades of regional food service expertise.

2.bio: Building lasting partnerships with hotels, restaurants, and catering operators across the Middle East.

3.bio: Overseeing installation, commissioning, and after-sales operations with manufacturer-certified expertise.

4.bio: Heading our in-house AutoCAD team that engineers every kitchen to its optimal flow and performance.

leadership.intro: Decades of food service expertise, engineering rigor, and unwavering commitment to client success — that's the team you partner with.

certifications.intro: Every brand we represent meets internationally recognized standards. Every project is executed to the same uncompromising benchmarks.

catalog.title: Download Our Complete Catalog
catalog.desc: Browse our full range of premium HoReCa equipment, brand portfolios, and project case studies — all in one comprehensive PDF.

showroom.description: Experience our curated selection of premium HoReCa equipment first-hand. Our team of specialists is ready to walk you through live demonstrations, kitchen layouts, and tailored solutions for your project.

card.title: Modern Showroom & Headquarters
card.desc: Our flagship space features working displays from 18+ international brands across all professional kitchen categories.
